title: glTF.EXT_crs_wkid
description: This extension declares the Coordinate Reference System (CRS) in which a glTF 2.1 asset was authored. The CRS is provided as a Well-Known ID (WKID), commonly an EPSG code.

authority.description: The organization that defines and manages a specific CRS identifier.

wkid.description: An integer that identifies the CRS.

vcsWkid.description: An integer that identifies the vertical CRS if wkid identifies a horizontal CRS.

epoch.description: An epoch for coordinates that are referenced to a dynamic CRS such as WGS 84. Expressed as a decimal year (e.g. '2019.81').
